title: Assessment for Substance Use Disorders * At Risk Families - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Mental & Behavioral Health > Assessment for Substance Use Disorders * At Risk Families 2 Matching Service Providers Refine Results - Select - No Filter At Risk Families Domestic Violence Issues Hispanic/Latino Community Native American Community Veterans Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF EUGENE RELIEF NURSERY ACCESSING SUCCESS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides support for individuals struggling with substance use or those in recovery. Services include screenings and referrals to treatment providers or community partners as needed. Collaborates with child welfare and local Treatment Court programs. Offers peer support for individuals in recovery, affected family members, and families involved in other Relief Nursery services. 1720 W 25th Avenue Eugene, OR 97405 Eligibility: Families with children age 6 and younger who are enrolled in other Relief Nursery services Hours: Monday-Thursday 9am-5pm, Friday 8:30am-12:30pm. Evening classes available.
